mainspring @ e7ffa22
Assembled flat (post-carve) from:
  spec/policy_types.py + governance/policy.py   -> policy.py
  spec/signal_types.py + governance/signals.py  -> signals.py
  governance/budget.py                          -> budget.py
  spec/pipeline.py                              -> pipeline.py
(ORM-free deterministic PolicyEngine + weighted decision-point cascade
 + its pure deps. Cross-layer imports rewritten to local relative ones.)
Re-vendor: MAINSPRING_DIR=... bash backend/scripts/vendor_mainspring_policy.sh
